steps.title: Identify the researcher's central claim
steps.content: The researcher claims that some lakes have seen a “decline in the duration of ice” between the early 1980s and mid-2000s. A typical example must demonstrate this specific decline—fewer ice days in 2005-06 than in 1980-81.

steps.title: Match the lake data to the decline claim
steps.content: Choice B shows Oulujärvi had fewer days in 2005-06 than 1980-81, directly supporting the researcher's claim. Choices A and D present single baseline values without comparing the periods to establish decline, while choice C contradicts the claim by asserting an increase. That matches choice B — B is correct.
